approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation-only continuation and specifically requested a nightly self-improvement loop where repeated failures, audit findings, builder mistakes, and local conversation lessons produce repairs, cards, gates, verifier/Plan Critic rules, or durable doctrine instead of documentation-only notes.
scopeSummary: Build the read-only scheduled Foundation lessons-learned loop with local/private metadata-only conversation boundary, documented-only failure dogfood, scheduled job registration, durable doctrine, focused proof, closeout, and Current Sprint advancement to FOUNDATION-BACKLOG-P0-REALITY-CLEANUP-001.
constraints: Foundation-only; do not start Value Builder split.
No external writes, Drive permission mutation, email sends, credential mutation, paid/provider access, private broad extraction, or provider/model calls.
Private conversation and local memory review must stay local/private metadata-only unless Steve explicitly approves external model use.
Lessons cannot close as documentation-only notes; they must route to cards, gates, verifier/Plan Critic rules, durable doctrine, approval-required exception, or no-op with proof.
Each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main.
